message:
Add depth tracking to XML parser

Prevent stack overflow from deeply nested XML by tracking nesting
depth during SAX parsing. The default limit is 256 levels, which
is sufficient for legitimate XML while protecting against malicious
input.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+{}
+warning: failed to parse XML: maximum nesting depth of 256 exceeded
+ --> tests/functions/parse/parse_xml_depth.tql:3:8
+  |
+3 | this = x.parse_xml(xpath="/*")[0]
+  |        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 
+  |
+
+warning: tried to access field of `null`
+ --> tests/functions/parse/parse_xml_depth.tql:3:8
+  |
+3 | this = x.parse_xml(xpath="/*")[0]
+  |        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ is null
+  |
+  = hint: use `[…]?` to suppress this warning
+
+warning: assignment to `this` requires `record`, but got `null`
+ --> tests/functions/parse/parse_xml_depth.tql:3:1
+  |
+3 | this = x.parse_xml(xpath="/*")[0]
+  | ~~~~ 
+  |
